svg.title: Route schedule for flrp-ssr_instance_75_8
svg.desc: Non-geographic route schedule with route totals and customer service times.
svg.text: cost = 15706.174; No. of customers = 75; No. of routes= 15

text.tspan: Times use nominal service durations and earliest-start propagation from a time-zero facility departure.
TW denotes the customer time window; start and end denote nominal service start and service completion.
